name: claude-code-sessions
description: TUI for browsing every local Claude Code session (CLI + Mac-app Local) in one place. Reads ~/.claude/projects/**/*.jsonl directly.

prerequisites.name: go
prerequisites.install_hint: Install Go 1.21+: https://go.dev/dl/  (macOS: brew install go  ·  Windows: winget install GoLang.Go)

methods.name: git+go
methods.command: mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/share" && { [ -d "$HOME/.local/share/claude-code-sessions/.git" ] && git -C "$HOME/.local/share/claude-code-sessions" pull --ff-only || git clone https://github.com/arghhhhh/claude-code-sessions.git "$HOME/.local/share/claude-code-sessions"; } && cd "$HOME/.local/share/claude-code-sessions" && go build -o claude-code-sessions .

post_install_hints: Add this shell function to ~/.zshrc or ~/.bashrc, then `source` it:
Then run `cs` from any directory to open the session picker.
Keys: ↑/↓ navigate · enter resume · d +--dangerously-skip-permissions · c +--chrome · D both · / search · q quit
